title: ruellia humilis var. longiflora
intro: Ruellia humilis var. longiflora, also known as the long-flowered ruellia or Mexican petunia, is a variety of flowering plant in the family Acanthaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Ruellia humilis var. longiflora include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and exhibit antiseptic properties. The plant is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is also used in folk medicine to treat various ailments.
